steps.description: Click the "Add" button in the "TodoListSPFxdev" app details window within the Microsoft Teams app interface.
Click on the "Search for a channel" input field in the "TodoListSPFxdev" app interface within Microsoft Teams to begin typing a query for selecting a channel.
Type text 'testatk03' into the input field under the "Let's go" header inside the "TodoListSPFxdev" popup menu on the Microsoft Teams Apps interface.
Click on the "testatk03" channel option listed under "Channels" in the "Choose a place to use the app" dialog box within the Microsoft Teams interface.
Click the "Go" button at the bottom-right corner of the "TodoListSPFxdev" dialog in the Microsoft Teams interface to confirm the selection and proceed.
Click the "Save" button in the Microsoft Teams popup window to confirm the addition of the TodoListSPFxdev tab and optionally post about it to the channel.
Click the "+ Add task" button in the "To Do List" section of the Microsoft Teams web interface (visible within a chat context).
Type the text 'test' into the input field under 'To Do List' in the Microsoft Teams interface, located after clicking on 'Chat' and selecting the 'TodoListSPFxdev...' tab.
Press the "Enter" key to add a new task with the text "test" in the "To Do List" section of Microsoft Teams.
Click on the "testAdmin (You)" user icon within the "Created By" section of the "To Do List" interface in Microsoft Teams, under the "TodoListSPFxdev" tab.
Click the "Delete" option in the dropdown menu associated with a task item in the "To Do List" section of the Microsoft Teams interface.
